games.name: Donkey Kong Run
games.description: An exciting journey through the jungle, caves and treetops. Run, jump, bounce and swing through vines to help Donkey Kong outrun an avalanche of bananas! Run through the levels, jumping between platforms, and avoiding obstacles and enemies. You&amp;rsquo;ll collect items such as bananas and unlock new Donkey Kong characters to reach the highscores

games.name: Save The Stick Draw Line

In this game, you can choose two modes to challenge: Save Stickman or Love Story. You will help a cute stickman character by drawing lines.

games.name: Plumber and Pipes
games.description: To all puzzle solving lovers out there, this game is for you! Play as a young plumber on his way to repair pipelines. Someone needs to get that water flowing. You will be able to rotate pipes in order to achieve this goal, creating complex and solid pipelines leading from the source of the water to your given objective. Make good use of the valves in your levels. Now get to it!

games.name: Bubble Ball Shooter
games.description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts. The player achieves their highest score by consecutively popping large matching clusters. They receive ten times the standard allotment of points when they pop avalanches of non-matched bubbles with a cluster and double their score when they clear the field entirely.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Additive Fun   2048
games.description: The gameplay is simple: you slide the numbered tiles in any of the eight directions, and when two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into one. Slide the Same Numbers offers a clean and minimalist design, with simple graphics and soothing sound effects. It is a game that will test your logical thinking and strategy skills, providing a challenging and engaging gameplay experience.

games.name: Tile Fruits
games.description: In Tile Fruits, embark on a delectable adventure packed with vibrant fruits and captivating challenges! This 2D tile-matching game tests your strategic prowess as you aim to connect three identical fruits to advance through progressively difficult levels. Each match removes the fruits from the board, but beware: having more than seven different types of fruits on the board at once results in a loss. The games colorful graphics, adorable fruit designs, and endearing sound effects create an immersive and enjoyable experience.
games.instructions: Playing Tile Fruits is straightforward yet engaging Simply tap on a fruit to select it and then match three identical fruits to remove them from the board As you clear levels youll face increasing difficulty with new challenges and unique layouts To

games.name: Dora Match3
games.description: Dora Match3 is a colorful puzzle adventure featuring your favorite explorer. Match gems, fruits, and other fun items to complete levels. Use boosters and power-ups to clear tricky puzzles. Enjoy vibrant graphics and fun sound effects inspired by Dora&amp;rsquo;s adventures. Challenge yourself with increasing difficulty and exciting new challenges. A great game for kids and fans of match-3 puzzles. Play at your own pace and improve problem-solving skills. Easy to learn but offers engaging challenges. Play online without downloads. Explore the world of Dora while solving puzzles!

games.name: Tank Soccer Battle 1 2 3 4 Player
games.description: Are you ready for a tank battle with your friends? A tank battle with a soccer ball! Bring your friends and fight with tanks.Fill up your tanks&amp;rsquo; ammunition and blow up all your friends&amp;rsquo; tanks. While blowing up your friends&amp;rsquo; tanks, don&amp;rsquo;t forget to shoot the soccer ball. The player who gets the soccer ball to the goal wins. You need to score a goal to win. Team up with your friend in a 2vs2 game and work together to score a goal.
games.instructions: Green Tank Use WASD to move and Q to fire Blue Tank Use Arrow Keys to move and P to fire Yellow Tank Use UHJK to move and M to fire Red Tank Use FCVB to move and N to fire

games.name: Claritas Dungeon Crawler RPG DEMO
games.description: Claritas is a 2D turn-based dungeon crawler RPG that focuses purely on strategic gameplay. With no story or plot, the game challenges players to experiment with party-building, skill fusion, and tactical combat. Choose from a diverse roster of heroes, each with four unique abilities, and create powerful synergies to dominate every encounter.
games.instructions: Desktop Controls - Confirm Z - Cancel X - Move Arrow keys Mobile Controls - Confirm Tap - Cancel Swipe or Two-finger tap - Move Tap

games.name: Tower Dance Off
games.description: Drag your character to the enemy tower and show off your best moves. Power-ups like add, subtract, double, and triple boost the fun. Choose from a variety of characters and enjoy 20 thrilling levels packed with dynamic player and enemy interactions. Let the dance battle begin!

games.name: The Sorting Mart
games.description: The Sorting Mart is a store sorting puzzle game that lets you experience the fun of shopping in a store. Rearrange items between shelves to match three identical ones on a shelf, clearing it and letting the upper shelves drop down. Clear entire stacks to shift adjacent shelves and keep matching before time runs out. If you get stuck, use the shuffle button to mix up the shelves and find matches more easily. Challenge your sorting skills as levels become more difficult!
games.instructions: Drag items between shelves using your mouse or touchpad Arrange three matching items on a shelf to clear them causing the shelves above to drop down Fully clearing a stack shifts the neighboring shelves Collect all items before time runs out

games.name: Dice Puzzle: Fruits!

Snatch fish from the bowl as swiftly as a hungry cat, but watch out&amp;mdash;grabbing fish bones won&amp;rsquo;t earn you points!
